encounter.reason: Follow-up after initial MFM consultation; patient questions regarding enoxaparin self-injection; coordination with hematology

document_references.description: Brief note documenting a follow-up telephone call after initial MFM consultation and ahead of upcoming hematology appointment. Covers patient education about enoxaparin self-injection technique and side effects, coordination with hematology regarding anticoagulation protocol, patient report of improved mood, and plan to await confirmatory APS antibody results before next in-person visit.
